name: io.github.kaditang/402sentinel-mcp
description: Assess an x402 counterparty's risk BEFORE paying: allow/review/block, scored on-chain (Base).

environmentVariables.name: CLIENT_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: A Base wallet (with USDC in its Circle Gateway balance) — pays per call, from $0.002.

environmentVariables.name: SENTINEL_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the service base URL (default https://402sentinel.com).
